name: Red Dragon Archfiend/Assault Mode
name_jp: レッド・デーモンズ・ドラゴン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>／</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スラッシュ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バスター
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate". After damage calculation, if this card attacked: Destroy all other monsters on the field. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Red Dragon Archfiend" in your GY; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate". After damage calculation, if this card attacked: Destroy all other monsters on the field. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Red Dragon Archfiend" in your GY; Special Summon that target.
